case_title: GUADALUPE FABIAN LORENZO VS. DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LORENZO, GUADALUPE FABIAN AKA  ALFREDO PEREZ P. AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LORENZO, GUADALUPE FABIAN AKA  ALFREDO PEREZ P. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,025.00 FILED BY LORENZO, GUADALUPE FABIAN AKA  ALFREDO PEREZ P. AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 1/29/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
